title: Romania Simple Passport Application (Anexa 10)
description: Give the details for Romania's application for the issuance of a new simple passport, for an adult Romanian citizen domiciled in Romania. This document models the Ministerul Afacerilor Externe's (MAE, Ministry of Foreign Affairs) own 'Anexa 10 -- Cerere pentru eliberarea unui nou pașaport' ('Annex 10 -- Application for the issuance of a new passport'), a single-page print-and-fill form filed at a local passport office (Serviciul Public Comunitar pentru Eliberarea și Evidența Pașapoartelor Simple) or a MAE diplomatic mission. It captures the applicant's core identity data (CNP, sex, date of birth, surname, first name, a prior surname if changed, parents' first names, place and county of birth, domicile address, and phone number), a declaration on whether the applicant already holds or has held a simple passport (with that passport's own number, issuing date, and issuing county if so, and the reason a new one is being requested), the identity document relied upon to prove identity (a closed choice of national ID card, the older identity bulletin, a provisional identity certificate, or a birth certificate, with the national ID card's own series/number/issue date captured when selected), a request for expedited (urgent) issuance, two physical-description fields (height and eye colour) historically printed on Romanian passport-office forms, the date of submission, and the applicant's consent to the processing of their personal data. It does not model the office-only right-hand column (officer identity/data-accuracy certification, application/dossier reference numbers), the 3.5x4.5cm photo placeholder box itself (captured instead as a documents[] entry), or either of the form's two physical signature lines. It does not submit the application; the live source is always authoritative.

source.documentRef: Anexa 10 -- Cerere pentru eliberarea unui nou pașaport (application for issuance of a new simple passport, for an adult domiciled in Romania)

verification.notes: GOV-2844: GovSchema Standard Research cycle, opening Romania's Passport vertical (5th of 6), following the Taxes (GOV-2797), DMV (GOV-2804), Business Formation (GOV-2813), and Visa (GOV-2837) verticals opened in prior cycles. This candidate was pre-scouted and Wayback-verified during the GOV-2837 cycle (see that schema's own VERIFICATION.md) and left as ready-to-author backlog. National ID & Civic Documents remains Romania's sole open vertical after this document. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing and extraction record.

fields.name: cnp
fields.label: CNP (Cod Numeric Personal / personal numeric identifier)

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex (M/F)

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Data nașterii / Date of birth
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'Data nașterii' (printed format hint: ZZLLAAAA / DDMMYYYY)

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Numele / Surname

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: Prenumele / First name

fields.name: previousName
fields.label: Numele anterior / Previous name (if changed)

fields.name: fathersFirstName
fields.label: Prenumele tatălui / Father's first name

fields.name: mothersFirstName
fields.label: Prenumele mamei / Mother's first name

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Locul nașterii / Place of birth

fields.name: countyOfBirth
fields.label: Județul / County of birth
fields.description: The Romanian county (județ) of birth. Left optional: the form prints no separate mechanism for an applicant born outside Romania, who would have no județ to state.

fields.name: domicileAddress
fields.label: Domiciliul / Domicile address

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.label: Telefon / Phone number

fields.name: hasPreviousPassport
fields.label: Declar pe propria răspundere că / I declare on my own responsibility that (mark with X the applicable situation)
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'Declar pe propria răspundere că (marcați cu X situația corespunzătoare): nu posed pașaport simplu / posed (am posedat) pașaportul simplu nr. ...'

fields.name: previousPassportNumber
fields.label: Pașaportul simplu nr. / Simple passport no.

fields.name: previousPassportIssueDate
fields.label: Eliberat la data de / Issued on date
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'eliberat la data de ... de formațiunea de pașapoarte'

fields.name: previousPassportIssuingCounty
fields.label: Formațiunea de pașapoarte din județul / Issuing passport office, county
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- '... de formațiunea de pașapoarte din județul ...'

fields.name: reasonForNewPassport
fields.label: Și solicit un nou pașaport deoarece / And I request a new passport because
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'și solicit un nou pașaport deoarece ...'

fields.name: idDocumentType
fields.label: Mă legitimez cu / I prove my identity with (mark with X)
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'Mă legitimez cu (marcați cu X): carte de identitate / buletin de identitate / adeverință provizorie de identitate / certificat de naștere'

fields.name: idCardSeries
fields.label: Carte de identitate seria / National ID card series
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'carte de identitate seria ... nr. ... eliberat la data de ...'

fields.name: idCardNumber
fields.label: Carte de identitate nr. / National ID card number
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'carte de identitate seria ... nr. ... eliberat la data de ...'

fields.name: idCardIssueDate
fields.label: Carte de identitate eliberată la data de / National ID card issue date
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'carte de identitate seria ... nr. ... eliberat la data de ...'

fields.name: urgentIssuanceRequested
fields.label: Solicit eliberarea pașaportului în regim de urgență / I request issuance of the passport on an expedited basis (DA/NU)
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'Solicit eliberarea pașaportului în regim de urgență. (Marcați cu X) DA NU'

fields.name: heightCm
fields.label: Înălțime / Height (cm)

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Culoarea ochilor / Eye colour
fields.description: The form prints no explicit list of eye-colour options, just a blank line, so this is modeled as free text rather than an invented enum.

fields.name: applicationSubmissionDate
fields.label: Data depunerii cererii / Date of application submission

fields.name: dataProcessingConsent
fields.label: Sunt de acord cu prelucrarea datelor prezentate în conformitate cu Legea 677/2001 / I agree to the processing of the data presented, in accordance with Law 677/2001
fields.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'Sunt de acord cu prelucrarea datelor prezentate în conformitate cu Legea 677/2001.'

documents.label: Documentul de identitate declarat / The identity document declared above
Declarație privind exactitatea datelor / Data-accuracy declaration
documents.statement: Cererea completată cu date inexacte și omisiuni este nulă de drept.
documents.sourceRef: Anexa 10 -- 'Cererea completată cu date inexacte și omisiuni este nulă de drept.'
